captureContext.environmentConfirmation: Human-confirmed; DEV badge visible in the production app
captureContext.captureMethod: adb exec-out screencap / adb shell screenrecord; ffmpeg metadata stripping and compression

notes: No credentials, tokens, precise locations, private datasets, or expanded notification content are visible.
The visible first name belongs to the user's dev testing account and was explicitly approved for publication.
The public Google Play URL was verified, but the signed-in phone showed the account-specific Internal Beta listing and linked device names; that screenshot was rejected.
The Offline ready picker was recaptured with the visible Classroom search filter so only the meaningful demo experiment appears; no experiment data was renamed, deleted, or modified.

assets.scope: Authenticated app home; no measurements were present at capture time
Devices sheet with Bluetooth scanning disabled and no MultispeQ connected
Experiment picker filtered to the clean Classroom demo with Offline ready state
Recent screen with one synced questions-only demo measurement and zero unsynced rows
Trimmed questions-only flow excerpt; excludes the dev experiment list and does not show final submission or MultispeQ hardware

unmetCaptures: Connected MultispeQ pairing with battery and firmware state
Protocol-guided MultispeQ measurement through result analysis
Wired USB multi-device round, partial failure, retry, offline save, and sync
Public Play Store screenshot from a non-tester account
True offline network transition with a queued row; the current app exposes Offline ready and sync counters but no persistent authenticated-home offline banner
